data.title: usdx.money enters the top 10 stablecoins by TVL, with BSC and Arbitrum both in the top 3
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to DefiLlama data, usdx.money has entered the top 10 stablecoins by TVL. Among them, usdx.money ranks in the top 3 on BNB Chain and Arbitrum.

data.title: The total open interest of LTC contracts on the entire network is nearly US$900 million, a record high in nearly four years
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Coinglass data shows that the total open interest of LTC futures contracts on the entire network is 6.7224 million LTC, equivalent to US$891 million, a four-year high, with a 24-hour increase of 5.8%.
Among them, the open interest of Binance LTC contracts is 2.3146 million LTC (approximately US$307 million), ranking first, with a 24-hour increase of 11.41%.

data.title: StarkWare co-founder: Vitalik has led Ethereum through many crises, and it will be safe
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News StarkWare co-founder and CEO Eli Ben-Sasson wrote on X: "I know Ethereum will survive, solve problems and prosper. I don't know how it will be achieved, and I am not involved in it, but the truth shines, and humanity needs a strong Ethereum.
Vitalik Buterin has led Ethereum through many crises, and it will be fine."

data.title: Yesterday, the U.S. Ethereum spot ETF had a net inflow of $19 million, marking the fourth consecutive day of net inflow
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Farside Investors data, the U.S. Ethereum spot ETF had a net inflow of $19 million yesterday, mainly from Fidelity FETH, and has had a net inflow for 4 consecutive days.

data.title: Canaan Technology Reports January Bitcoin Mining Update
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Canaan Technology has released its unaudited monthly update for its Bitcoin mining operations as of January 31, 2025. The report reveals that the company mined 88 Bitcoins in January. By the end of the month, Canaan Technology held 1,319 Bitcoins on its balance sheet. Additionally, the company reported a deployed hash rate of approximately 6.43 EH/s and an operational hash rate of around 5.53 EH/s.

data.title: Microsoft Unveils Majorana 1 Quantum Chip Driven By Topological Superconductivity
data.description:
According to Odaily, Microsoft has introduced Majorana 1, a groundbreaking quantum chip powered by a unique state of matter known as topological superconductivity. This advancement, published in the scientific journal Nature, utilizes a custom material called a topoconductor to create and control Majorana particles, potentially expanding quantum computing capabilities to tackle previously unsolvable problems. 

Topoconductors are semiconductors that can also function as superconductors, conducting electricity with minimal energy loss at extremely low temperatures. The production of this material requires atomic-level precision and temperatures as low as minus 400 degrees. Despite the complexity and cost, Microsoft emphasizes the benefits of this effort. 

Krysta Svore, a Microsoft technical researcher, stated in a company video that this material allows for the construction of a new infrastructure for quantum computing, known as the topological core. This infrastructure could enable the expansion of quantum bits on a chip to millions, rather than just dozens or hundreds. 

The project is one of Microsoft's longest-running initiatives, beginning in the early 21st century when Bill Gates was CEO. Under the Majorana architecture, a quantum computer built with controllable quantum bits could solve problems beyond the reach of today's most powerful supercomputers. The current version of the chip contains eight topological quantum bits, but Microsoft claims the architecture can scale to one million quantum bits on a single palm-sized chip, pushing the boundaries of current quantum computing limitations. Microsoft plans to continue refining this technology through research collaborations before commercializing it.

data.title: IP Reaches New Highs With Significant Surge
data.description: According to Odaily, the cryptocurrency IP experienced a brief surge, surpassing 3 USDT and reaching a new all-time high. It is currently trading at 2.94 USDT, marking a 24-hour increase of 37.88%.

data.title: IP briefly exceeded 3 USDT, setting a new record high
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News OKX market shows that IP briefly broke through 3 USDT, setting a new record high, and is now reported at 2.94 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 37.88%.

data.title: OSL: Web3 payment has a "generation gap in experience" in terms of cost and other dimensions, which will force TradFi to accelerate its transformation to Web3
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News At the Future Stablecoin Summit 2025 organized by WOW Impact Group, OSL Executive Director and Head of Regulatory Affairs Gary Tiu pointed out that the competitive logic of the payment track can essentially be summarized as the "toll road theory", that is, payment channels are very similar to toll roads. Users will choose the most efficient and lowest friction route in terms of time and cost, and capital flows are also looking for regulatory compliance, fast settlement and cost-optimal channels. Therefore, stablecoin payments will gradually be widely accepted by more traditional financial institutions. Gary Tiu cited data to emphasize that the efficiency of Web3 payments is defining the future of payments, and this "generation gap in experience" will also be expected to further force traditional financial institutions to accelerate Web3 transformation.

data.title: BitMart will list Artificial Superintelligence Alliance (FET)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, BitMart will launch Artificial Superintelligence Alliance (FET) at 13:00 (Eastern Time) on February 20, and the $FET/USDT trading pair will be launched.
The Artificial Superintelligence Alliance is an artificial intelligence laboratory based in Cambridge that is building the infrastructure required for autonomous software agents to perform economic work on behalf of individuals, machines, businesses, and organizations. The Artificial Superintelligence Alliance's network is based on open source technology and allows users to access AI capabilities on world-class secure data sets to perform complex coordination tasks in the modern economy.
